text: What method of manhandling technique would you use if a crew member is unconscious?

options.text: B) Simple forward and aft carry
D) Neither of the above options

explanation: When a crew member is unconscious, safe and effective extrication requires specific techniques. Both the Fireman's lift and the simple forward and aft carry are recognized methods suitable for moving an incapacitated individual, depending on the situation and rescuer's capability.
